explanation: The original command is preserved with quotes added for safe execution in a test environment.
Omission of quotes is allowed in some contexts, and this variation tests if the detection rule accounts for it.
Double backslashes are used as an alternative representation of the path, simulating path normalization.
Sysnative is a special alias for System32 in 32-bit processes on 64-bit Windows, testing path recoding.
Uses the %windir% environment variable as an alternative representation of the Windows directory.
